calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Continued To Apr-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Continued To Mar-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Continued To Mar-17-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randolph Harris for Timothy Goode.

The Court stated that the issues raised by the Probate Examiner have to do with the proposal of a buyout of John's daughters' interest in the Joost Avenue property, whether they agreed to it, whether they waived an accounting, whether they agreed to the terms of the loan and questioned who will pay the loan back. Mr. Harris stated that he was not aware of the issues raised, that he did not receive notes, that he does not believe it requires an accounting, that the heirs of the predeceased spouse are entitlement to the predeceased spouse's equity interest only, that two heirs get the estate and that the Uncle and the Nephew are the petitioners. The accounting petition was continued to March 17, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to address the issues raised by the Probate Examiner.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Continued To Jan-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2014 Continued To Jan-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Continued To Dec-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Continued To Dec-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Continued To Nov-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randy Harris for Timothy D. Goode and Timothy M. Goode.

The Court questioned if the Daughters know that they may be entitled to something from the Estate and should not a Moore Marsden calculation be made and presented to them. Mr. Harris stated that he agrees, that they are working on it, that they need more time, that based on the caluclations it may be necessary to sell the property and requested a continuance. Mr. Harris also stated that they will file a petition regarding sale and a petition regarding calculations. The petition for final distribution was continued to November 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-12-2014 Continued To Sep-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-15-2014 Continued To Aug-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Continued To Jul-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Karen Maready for Timothy Goode.

Ms. Maready stated that at the time of death of Mr. Markham explicitly disinherited his Daughters and left everything to his Wife. Ms. Maready also stated that the burden of proof would be on the Daughters to show what property is attributed to Mr. Markham. The accounting petition was continued to July 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide more calculation/information on the property as to John's share.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Continued To May-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Continued To May-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Continued To Apr-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Karen Maready for Timothy D. Goode and Timothy M. Goode (Petitioners).

Ms. Maerady provided case background, stated that notice was provided to the stepdaughters, informed the Court that the real property has not been sold, and she is unaware of any additional income coming into the estate. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration (subject to review of the order). The bond amount is $662,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
